title: MD
biography: Victor McKusick was an American geneticist known as the 'father of medical genetics.' He created the OMIM database cataloguing all known genetic disorders and established medical genetics as a clinical discipline.
aiSummary: Victor McKusick is a genetics specialist at Johns Hopkins University. Based in Baltimore.

timeline.title: Published Mendelian Inheritance in Man
timeline.description: Created the comprehensive catalog of human genes and genetic disorders, later becoming OMIM

timeline.title: Founded medical genetics at Hopkins
timeline.description: Established the first medical genetics division at Johns Hopkins
